content: {"question":"Under current FDA DSHEA boundaries and Codex Alimentarius labeling standards, what specific evidentiary thresholds and vulnerable-population warnings are required to distinguish lawful intermittent fasting dietary guidance from unlawful disease claims on meal-plan apps and nutraceutical products?","search_queries":["FDA DSHEA structure function claims intermittent fasting dietary supplements disease claim boundary","FDA qualified health claim intermittent fasting evidentiary standard significant scientific agreement","Codex Alimentarius guidelines use nutrition health claims fasting meal replacement cross-border","FTC enforcement actions intermittent fasting apps deceptive health claims vulnerable populations warning","EFSA Article 13.5 intermittent fasting health claim pregnancy diabetes eating disorder contraindication labeling"],"perspective":"Regulatory"}
